page: Google Cloud Platform c4n-highmem-96 is a memory-optimized server instance belonging to the c4n family. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 744.0 GB of system memory. This configuration provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 7.75 GB per core, positioning it for memory-intensive workloads that require substantial RAM capacity alongside a high count of dedicated processing cores.

The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached storage options. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention from other tenants on the host hardware.

Given its high memory density and dedicated compute resources, the c4n-highmem-96 is suited for large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise applications, and memory-heavy data processing pipelines. The lack of local storage and GPU acceleration makes it less suitable for local high-speed scratch disk operations or hardware-accelerated machine learning training.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4n-highmem-96 is a memory-optimized server instance within the c4n family, designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture and 744.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high resource density of 7.75 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, requiring external storage solutions for data persistence. With dedicated CPU allocation, it delivers predictable processing performance without virtualization-induced resource contention. This hardware profile is optimized for memory-heavy applications, such as large-scale in-memory databases, data analytics pipelines, and enterprise resource planning systems that demand significant memory capacity alongside substantial parallel processing power.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4n-highmem-96 is a memory-optimized server featuring 96 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 744.0 GB of RAM. It is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and databases.

tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized instance featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and substantial memory capacity for demanding enterprise database workloads.

No bundled local storage or GPU hardware
